summary: Completed testing of timeout fix implementation for LLM Council stages. All timeout-related changes working correctly and no asyncio.wait_for conflicts detected.
passed_tests: Backend compiles and starts without errors
execute_with_throttle no longer uses asyncio.wait_for (relies on httpx timeout only)
LoadBalancer logs 'Completed' when a model responds successfully (verified in logs)
query_lm_studio logs timeout values correctly: 'timeout=300.0s' in LM Studio requests
LoadBalancer logs throttled execution with correct parameters
Timeout propagation works correctly for OpenRouter mode (120s)
Timeout propagation works correctly for LM Studio mode (300s)
Throttle configuration saves and loads correctly
API key requirement logic works correctly for different modes
Message sending works in LM Studio mode without API key
All existing API functionality remains intact
